title: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.
notes: This event has a two-stage flow. Choosing to [gold]Return the Key[/gold] immediately ends the event and grants 100 Gold. Choosing to [gold]Keep the Key[/gold] leads to combat against the Mysterious Knight. Winning the fight grants the [gold]Lantern Key[/gold] card as a reward.
